events.label: assistant
events.text: I’ll inspect the gas monitor image, read the four channels, then write the required JSON only to `/app/answer.json`.

events.label: assistant
events.text: The basic `file` utility is not installed in this container, so I’m opening the image directly for visual inspection.

events.label: assistant
events.text: The monitor reads O2 20.9% vol, LEL 13%, H2S 1 ppm, and CO 5 ppm. The LEL value is over the usual OSHA confined-space hazardous atmosphere threshold of 10% LFL/LEL, so I’m recording this as a failed pre-entry authorization.
